SharedDataPackageInquiry.reservationLength: Validity period of the shared data package (unit: months), valid values: 1/6/12
SharedDataPackageInquiry.capacity: Capacity of the shared data package. When validity is 1 month, available options: "10G"/"50G"/"100G"/"500G"/"1T"/"5T"/"10T"/"50T"; when validity is 6 months, available options: "60G"/"300G"/"600G"/"3T"/"6T"/"30T"/"60T"/"300T"; when validity is 12 months, available options: "1T"/"10T"/"50T"/"100T"/"500T"/"1P". Capacity must be selected from the corresponding available options.
SharedDataPackageInquiry.deductPolicy: Deduction policy of the shared data package. Options: "FullTimeDurationPackage" for full-time; "TimeDurationPackage" for off-peak time. Defaults to "FullTimeDurationPackage".
SharedDataPackageInquiry.packageType: Line type of the shared data package. Currently supports "WebOutBytes" (dynamic). Defaults to "WebOutBytes".
